channel.title: untagged on Blogging Newb
channel.description: Recent content in untagged on Blogging Newb

item.title: Sleep
item.description: I get an average of 5 hours of sleep per day. Five hours. It wasn't always like this. There were times when I slept around 8 hours a day. That's the recommended number of hours of sleep one must get right? I heard that different people tend to sleep different amounts of time, but I'm pretty sure that 5 hours is not in the set of all recommended durations of sleep for a human being.
